rulings.Case Title: ROBERT LEGERE VS. ERNEST TARK III et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 6, 2007, LINE 10, DEFENDANTS ERNEST TARK AND FLORESCITO CALUMPANG'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 4, 5, 6 AND 8 TO PLEAD THAT PLAINTIFF ASSUMED THE OBLIGATIONS OF THE MASTER LEASE, WHICH IS A REQUIREMENT TO PUT PLAINTIFF IN PRIVITY WITH DEFENDANT AS A THIRD-PARTY BENEFICIARY. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 TO PLEAD A QUALIFYING EXERCISE OF A PROTECTED RIGHT, IF PLAINITFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. MERELY CONTINUING TO OCCUPY UNDER THE SUB-LEASE IS INSUFFICIENT. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3, WHICH DOES NOT DEPEND ON PRIVITY. =(302/PJB/SN-X)
